name: candlestick-chart
description: Unified candlestick chart component supporting all variations: basic, moving averages (MA5, MA10, MA20), and volume configurations

xAxisData.name: xAxisData
xAxisData.description: Array of date/time labels for the X-axis. Example: ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri']

data.name: data
data.description: Array of OHLC data for basic candlestick. Each item is [open, close, low, high]. Example: [[20, 34, 10, 38], [40, 35, 30, 50]]

priceData.name: priceData
priceData.description: Array of OHLC price data when using moving averages or volume. Each item is [open, close, low, high]. Example: [[100, 120, 95, 130], [120, 115, 110, 125]]

ma5Data.name: ma5Data
ma5Data.description: 5-period moving average data. When provided, displays MA5 line overlay. Example: [110, 115, 120, 125]

ma10Data.name: ma10Data
ma10Data.description: 10-period moving average data. When provided, displays MA10 line overlay. Example: [105, 110, 115, 120]

ma20Data.name: ma20Data
ma20Data.description: 20-period moving average data. When provided, displays MA20 line overlay. Example: [100, 105, 110, 115]

volumeData.name: volumeData
volumeData.description: Array of volume data corresponding to each price period. When provided, displays volume bars below the candlestick chart. Example: [150000, 180000, 220000]

upColor.name: upColor
upColor.description: Candlestick color for up (rising) candles. Example: '#ec0000'

downColor.name: downColor
downColor.description: Candlestick color for down (falling) candles. Example: '#00da3c'

upBorderColor.name: upBorderColor
upBorderColor.description: Candlestick border color for up candles. Example: '#8A0000'

downBorderColor.name: downBorderColor
downBorderColor.description: Candlestick border color for down candles. Example: '#008F28'

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 450
